title: WorkRequest
description: Reported demand, before commitment — the front door for work that needs triage. A request is submitted, reviewed and either rejected or converted into a WorkOrder (which then enters the lifecycle at 'requested'). Schedule-generated PM work does NOT come through here; it enters the work order directly because the strategy is already approved. One JSON document = one work request.

locationId.description: Where, when no specific asset applies.

priority.description: Requester-suggested priority. The planner may override it on the resulting work order (which holds the authoritative value).

status.description: submitted -> under_review -> approved -> converted, or -> rejected. 'converted' means a WorkOrder was created (see workOrderId).

source.description: How the demand arrived. 'inspection' and 'alarm' feed automatic requests from failed readings / condition alerts.

workOrderId.description: Set when the request is converted — the WorkOrder it became.

rejectionReason.description: Required when status = rejected; the requester is notified with it.
